reason: council 3/3 endorsed: F1 script-path $MIKADO discovery loop (identical to shipped chunk-map fix — a documented command that fails on first run) + a single validate() preflight collapsing dangling-dep/missing-id/dup-id/nodes-not-list into one clear error (self-test 7->12, all pass) + utf-8 read + clean error handling. delta 0.0 (no regression), self-test green, but blind winner != with_skill because a strong executor knows the Mikado doctrine unaided AND the 4 doctrine cases dont test the engine/invocation. Edits preserved at scratchpad/mikado-edits.patch. PROPOSED for checkpoint: ENGINE-exercising eval cases (plan with a dangling dep / cycle / duplicate id → skill knows to run mikado.py + read validate error, blank baseline does not) so with_skill wins; OR deterministic-gate mikado on its self-test like llm-council. REVERTED to unblock; re-apply after user checkpoint
title: same eval-gap as hookify: doctrine eval scores 1.0/1.0 both arms on Opus (blind 2-2 tie), and the engine/doc changes are not exercised by the doctrine cases — blind gate unwinnable
